# WeekFit

> AI fitness coach for iPhone. Reads sleep, recovery, activity and nutrition from Apple Health. Private, on-device, no account required.

## Product

- Name: WeekFit
- Platform: iPhone (iOS 17+)
- Category: Health / fitness app
- Price: Free
- Status: Public TestFlight beta
- Privacy: Local-first, no ads, health data not sold

## Capabilities

- Recovery score from sleep, HRV and resting heart rate
- Activity and workouts synced from Apple Health
- Nutrition and macro tracking in daily context
- AI Coach: daily guidance based on combined health signals
- Weekly workout planning

## Pages

- https://weekfit.app/
- https://weekfit.app/download/
- https://weekfit.app/faq/

## Install

- TestFlight: https://testflight.apple.com/join/t5TKwEff

## Contact

- support@weekfit.app

## Index

- Sitemap: https://weekfit.app/sitemap.xml

## Note

WeekFit provides fitness and wellness guidance, not medical advice.
